abi_metadata.A_semantics: A = (I + strict_lower(diag(beta) @ K @ K^T))^-1 per chunk; g is not folded into A for the CP ABI
abi_metadata.beta_folding_convention: beta folded inside A producer and also passed to downstream CP ABI as b
abi_metadata.dtype_store_policy: A stored in input dtype; internal accumulators are float32
abi_metadata.fused_replay_output_API: gdn_prefill.fused_gdr_fwd(q, k, v, a=A, g=g_cum, b=beta, ...)
abi_metadata.g_g_cum_convention: generic A uses g_zero; chunk-local g_cum is passed separately to CP replay
abi_metadata.materialization_handoff: materialized A tensor handed to PR1596 CP preprocess and fused_gdr_fwd
abi_metadata.physical_layout: contiguous BTHC handoff; produced as BHSC then permuted to BTHC
abi_metadata.producer_extra_work_note: current generic fused_prepare_compute_w_u_tl also computes unused w/u; latency is a conservative V5 full-op row, not an A-only microbenchmark
abi_metadata.triangular_convention: unit diagonal plus lower-triangular inverse rows; upper triangle zero/unused
